channel.title: Ansible
channel.description: ansible-navigator Ansible Navigator` ansible-navigator setup Register subscription manager subscription-manager register Show available subscriptions subscription-manager list –available Scroll down and copy the pool id: Attach to the subscription: subscription-manager attach –pool=2c94b9169c25391b019c690720d56541 Show repos and grab the most recent one: Getting Ready for RHCE Let’s make sure we have everything we need set up for getting RHCE certified. Scheduling the exam First step I needed to take was scheduling the exam. I picked a date a couple weeks before my voucher expires. Just in case I fail, I want to be able to study hard for two weeks. Then do a retake. How to Install Ansible Using uv Insall ansible using uv Ad Hoc Ansible Commands How to use Ad-Hoc Ansible Commands Ansible Inventory and Ansible.cfg Setting up and Ansible environment Ansible Playbooks Getting started with Ansible Playbooks Ansible Roles Ansible Galaxy Roles, RHEL System Roles, and Role Structure Ansible Vault Ansible Vault Ansible.cfg Ansible.cfg Boot Process Managing Boot Process with Ansible Deploying files Manipulating files, SELinux, and Jinja2 templates Encrypted passwords Encrypted passwords Handlers Handlers Host Name Patterns Working with host name patterns Including and importing Files Including and importing Files Jinja2 templates Jinja2 templates Manage Users and Groups with Ansible How to Manage Users and Groups with Ansible Managing Packages, Repositories, and Subscriptions with Ansible How to Manage Packages, Repositories, and Subscriptions with Ansible Managing Partitions and LVM Managing Partitions and LVM Managing Services with Ansible How to Manage Services with Ansible Optimizing Ansible Processing Optimizing Ansible Processing SeLinux File Properties How to manage SeLinux File Properties with Ansible SSH Connections SSH Connections Using Ansible Tags Guide for how to use Ansible Tags. What are they, and some examples to put them to use. Using Loops and Items Using Loops and Items Using Modules for Troubleshooting and Testing Using Modules for Troubleshooting and Testing Using Variables In Ansible How to Use Variables In Ansible Using when to Run Tasks Conditionally Using when to Run Tasks Conditionally

item.title: ansible-navigator
item.description: Ansible Navigator` ansible-navigator setup Register subscription manager subscription-manager register Show available subscriptions subscription-manager list --available Scroll down and copy the pool id: Attach to the subscription: subscription-manager attach --pool=2c94b9169c25391b019c690720d56541 Show repos and grab the most recent one:

item.title: Getting Ready for RHCE
item.description: Let’s make sure we have everything we need set up for getting RHCE certified. Scheduling the exam First step I needed to take was scheduling the exam. I picked a date a couple weeks before my voucher expires. Just in case I fail, I want to be able to study hard for two weeks. Then do a retake.
